originalTitle: Two of our favorite art TVs are more than 40 percent off this weekend
summary: Art TVs aren’t exactly known for being affordable, which is why Woot’s latest sale is notable. Now through June 26th, the retailer is discounting Samsung’s 2025 Frame TV and Hisense’s 2025 CanvasTV. The 65-inch CanvasTV is down to $779.99 ($520 off) — its best price of the year — while Samsung’s like-minded Frame TV is […]
content: Art TVs aren’t exactly known for being affordable, which is why Woot’s latest sale is notable. Now through June 26th, the retailer is discounting Samsung’s 2025 Frame TV and Hisense’s 2025 CanvasTV. The 65-inch CanvasTV is down to $779.99 ($520 off) — its best price of the year — while Samsung’s like-minded Frame TV is on sale in multiple sizes starting at $587.99 ($312 off). If you want a bigger set, the 75-inch CanvasTV is also on sale for $1,197.99 ($1,302 off). However, note that both Hisense models come with a one-year warranty, whereas the Frame TVs only include a 90-day warranty through Woot. [Product: Hisense CanvasTV (2025) | https://bestbuy.7tiv.net/c/482924/614286/10014?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.bestbuy.com%2Fproduct%2Fhisense-65-class-s7-series-canvastv-4k-qled-tv-with-hi-matte-display-and-ultraslim-wall-mount-2024%2FJ3Z9Z4234Y, https://www.anrdoezrs.net/links/8836598/type/dlg/https://electronics.woot.com/offers/new-hisense-canvastv-4k-smart-tv-2025-model-3?ref=w_cnt_wp_0_1] [Product: Samsung The Frame (2025) | https://www.anrdoezrs.net/links/8836598/type/dlg/https://electronics.woot.com/offers/new-samsung-the-frame-ls03f-2025-model-2?ref=w_cnt_wp_0_3, https://www.anrdoezrs.net/links/8836598/type/dlg/https://electronics.woot.com/offers/new-samsung-the-frame-ls03f-2025-model-2?ref=w_cnt_wp_0_3, https://www.anrdoezrs.net/links/8836598/type/dlg/https://electronics.woot.com/offers/new-samsung-the-frame-ls03f-2025-model-2?ref=w_cnt_wp_0_3] Both 4K TVs deliver an excellent, art-focused experience. When my colleague John Higgins compared the two panels in November, he found that the artwork looked remarkably realistic on their matte displays, even though the Frame was brighter (661 vs. 527 nits) and handled reflections better. Hisense also includes a magnetic bezel with each purchase and, by default, access to more than 1,000 works by renowned artists such as Van Gogh and Monet. Samsung, meanwhile, charges up to $200 for its optional bezels, depending on the size, plus another $50 a year for access to its full suite of artwork. In addition to blending easily into your home decor, both the Hisense and the Frame are great for watching TV and gaming. Each offers a max 144Hz variable refresh rate (except for the 43- and 50-inch Frame models), which helps make fast-paced action movies, sports, and games look smooth. The Frame also offers four HDMI 2.1 ports instead of just two, though the CanvasTV has the leg up when it comes to software, since it runs on Google’s intuitive TV interface rather than Samsung’s clunky Tizen OS. Both sets support Google Assistant and Amazon Alexa for voice controls, though, as well as Apple AirPlay.
chineseTitle: 我们最喜欢的两款艺术电视本周末折扣超过 40%
chineseSummary: 艺术电视并不以价格实惠而闻名，这就是 Woot 最新拍卖引人注目的原因。即日起至 6 月 26 日，该零售商正在对三星 2025 款 Frame TV 和海信 2025 款 CanvasTV 进行打折。 65 英寸 CanvasTV 降至 779.99 美元（折扣 520 美元）——今年最优惠的价格——而三星志同道合的 Frame TV […]
chineseContent: 艺术电视并不以价格实惠而闻名，这就是 Woot 最新拍卖引人注目的原因。即日起至 6 月 26 日，该零售商正在对三星 2025 款 Frame TV 和海信 2025 款 CanvasTV 进行打折。 65 英寸 CanvasTV 已降至 779.99 美元（折扣 520 美元），这是今年的最优惠价格，而三星类似的 Frame TV 则有多种尺寸可供选择，起价为 587.99 美元（折扣 312 美元）。如果您想要更大的电视机，75 英寸 CanvasTV 的售价也为 1,197.99 美元（折扣 1,302 美元）。但请注意，海信的两款型号均提供一年保修，而 Frame 电视仅通过 Woot 提供 90 天保修。 [产品：海信CanvasTV（2025）| https://bestbuy.7tiv.net/c/482924/614286/10014?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.bestbuy.com%2Fproduct%2Fhisense-65 -class-s7-series-canvastv-4k-qled-tv-with-hi-matte-display-and-ultraslim-wall-mount-2024%2FJ3Z9Z4234Y， https://www.anrdoezrs.net/links/8836598/type/dlg/https:// electronics.woot.com/offers/new-hisense-canvastv-4k-smart-tv-2025-model-3?ref=w_cnt_wp_0_1] [产品：三星 The Frame (2025) | https://www.anrdoezrs.net/links/8836598/type/dlg/https:// electronics.woot.com/offers/new-samsung-the-frame-ls03f-2025-model-2?ref=w_cnt_wp_0_3， https://www.anrdoezrs.net/links/8836598/type/dlg/https:// electronics.woot.com/offers/new-samsung-the-frame-ls03f-2025-model-2?ref=w_cnt_wp_0_3， https://www.anrdoezrs.net/links/8836598/type/dlg/https:// electronics.woot.com/offers/new-samsung-the-frame-ls03f-2025-model-2?ref=w_cnt_wp_0_3] 这两款 4K 电视均提供出色的、以艺术为中心的体验。当我的同事 John Higgins 在 11 月份比较这两个面板时，他发现艺术品在哑光显示屏上看起来非常逼真，尽管 Frame 更亮（661 尼特与 527 尼特）并且处理反射的效果更好。海信还包括一个磁性边框
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
